desc.es: El factor decisivo que le ha permitido liberar toda su fuerza ha sido el estrecho vínculo y la confianza que profesa a su Entrenador.
desc.en: The final factor needed to release this Pokémon’s true power was a strong bond with a Trainer it trusts.

desc.es: Lo recubre un duro caparazón que se quiebra en pedazos al impactar con la superficie de la tierra.
desc.en: Although its outer shell is uncommonly durable, the shock of falling to the ground smashes the shell to smithereens.

desc.es: Lo recubre un duro caparazón que se quiebra en pedazos al impactar con la superficie de la tierra.
desc.en: Although its outer shell is uncommonly durable, the shock of falling to the ground smashes the shell to smithereens.

desc.es: El motivo de su letargo vitalicio es la sustancia somnífera que contienen las hojas de las que se alimenta.
desc.en: It remains asleep from birth to death as a result of the sedative properties of the leaves that form its diet.

desc.es: El material explosivo de su caparazón está compuesto por el azufre del que se alimenta. Sus excrementos explosivos son muy peligrosos.
desc.en: Eating sulfur in its volcanic habitat is what causes explosive compounds to develop in its shell. Its droppings are also dangerously explosive.

desc.es: Cuando se encuentra en peligro, se hace una bola, eriza las púas del lomo y propina descargas eléctricas a diestro y siniestro.
desc.en: When it’s in trouble, it curls up into a ball, makes its fur spikes stand on end, and then discharges electricity indiscriminately.

desc.es: Cuando se encuentra en peligro, se hace una bola, eriza las púas del lomo y propina descargas eléctricas a diestro y siniestro.
desc.en: When it’s in trouble, it curls up into a ball, makes its fur spikes stand on end, and then discharges electricity indiscriminately.

desc.es: Un investigador que miró dentro del saco para estudiar a este Pokémon perdió la vida a causa de una misteriosa enfermedad.
desc.en: There was a scientist who peeked under Mimikyu’s old rag in the name of research. The scientist died of a mysterious disease.

desc.es: Un investigador que miró dentro del saco para estudiar a este Pokémon perdió la vida a causa de una misteriosa enfermedad.
desc.en: There was a scientist who peeked under Mimikyu’s old rag in the name of research. The scientist died of a mysterious disease.

desc.es: Un investigador que miró dentro del saco para estudiar a este Pokémon perdió la vida a causa de una misteriosa enfermedad.
desc.en: There was a scientist who peeked under Mimikyu’s old rag in the name of research. The scientist died of a mysterious disease.

desc.es: Un investigador que miró dentro del saco para estudiar a este Pokémon perdió la vida a causa de una misteriosa enfermedad.
desc.en: There was a scientist who peeked under Mimikyu’s old rag in the name of research. The scientist died of a mysterious disease.

desc.es: Su piel es tan gruesa que ni las espinas de Mareanie pueden perforarla. Con su fuerte dentadura tritura y engulle dichas espinas.
desc.en: Its skin is thick enough to fend off Mareanie’s spikes. With its robust teeth, Bruxish crunches up the spikes and eats them.

desc.es: Es de naturaleza mansa y amable, pero, si se enfurece, puede desatar fuertes vientos capaces de llevarse cualquier cosa por delante.
desc.en: Drampa is a kind and friendly Pokémon—up until it’s angered. When that happens, it stirs up a gale and flattens everything around.

desc.es: Es de naturaleza mansa y amable, pero, si se enfurece, puede desatar fuertes vientos capaces de llevarse cualquier cosa por delante.
desc.en: Drampa is a kind and friendly Pokémon—up until it’s angered. When that happens, it stirs up a gale and flattens everything around.

desc.es: Acecha a su presa hundiendo el ancla en el mar. Es capaz de drenar la vitalidad incluso de presas del tamaño de un Wailord.
desc.en: After lowering its anchor, it waits for its prey. It catches large Wailord and drains their life-force.

desc.es: Se comunica con sus congéneres mediante los sonidos que produce al golpear sus escamas, duras como el acero.
desc.en: Jangmo-o strikes its scales to communicate with others of its kind. Its scales are actually fur that’s become as hard as metal.

desc.es: Tras hacer sonar sus escamas y proferir su grito de guerra, carga contra el enemigo y lo hace trizas con sus afiladas garras.
desc.en: Before attacking its enemies, it clashes its scales together and roars. Its sharp claws shred the opposition.

desc.es: Se han descubierto antiguas representaciones pictóricas de guerreros que lucían armaduras confeccionadas con escamas de Kommo-o.
desc.en: Certain ruins have paintings of ancient warriors wearing armor made of Kommo-o scales.

desc.es: Se han descubierto antiguas representaciones pictóricas de guerreros que lucían armaduras confeccionadas con escamas de Kommo-o.
desc.en: Certain ruins have paintings of ancient warriors wearing armor made of Kommo-o scales.

desc.es: El espíritu guardián de Melemele, capaz de blandir el rayo. Su eterna curiosidad le lleva a veces a mostrarse ante las personas.
desc.en: The lightning-wielding guardian deity of Melemele, Tapu Koko is brimming with curiosity and appears before people from time to time.

desc.es: Este espíritu guardián es tan candoroso como despiadado, por lo que se podría decir que es la encarnación de la naturaleza misma.
desc.en: Although called a guardian deity, Tapu Lele is devoid of guilt about its cruel disposition and can be described as nature incarnate.

desc.es: El espíritu guardián de Ula-Ula, que gobierna la flora. Hace repicar su cola para alertar de su presencia y prevenir riñas sin sentido.
desc.en: It makes ringing sounds with its tail to let others know where it is, avoiding unneeded conflicts. This guardian deity of Ula’ula controls plants.

desc.es: A pesar de ser un espíritu guardián, trae desgracias a aquellos que se le acercan sin la debida cortesía.
desc.en: Although it’s called a guardian deity, terrible calamities sometimes befall those who recklessly approach Tapu Fini.

desc.es: Su escasa prudencia y gran curiosidad lo llevan a menudo a ponerse en peligro. En caso de apuro, se teletransporta para huir.
desc.en: Cosmog is very curious but not very cautious, often placing itself in danger. If things start to look dicey, it teleports away.

desc.es: Absorbe impetuoso polvo de la atmósfera y pone todo su empeño en crear en su núcleo la energía necesaria para evolucionar.
desc.en: It sucks in dust from the air at an astounding rate, frantically building up energy within its core as preparation for evolution.

desc.es: Antiguamente era conocido como la Criatura que se Nutre del Sol. Emite sin cesar una energía luminosa.
desc.en: Solgaleo was once known as the Beast That Devours the Sun. Energy in the form of light radiates boundlessly from it.

desc.es: Devora toda la luz que haya a su alrededor y adopta la forma de una luna llena que ilumina la oscura noche.
desc.en: It steals the light from its surroundings and then becomes the full moon, showering its own light across the night sky.

desc.es: Llegó a este mundo a través de un Ultraumbral. Es un parásito que se aprovecha de Pokémon y personas.
desc.en: It appeared in this world from an Ultra Wormhole. Nihilego appears to be a parasite that lives by feeding on people and Pokémon.

desc.es: Uno de los Ultraentes. Posee una musculatura excesivamente desarrollada.
desc.en: Buzzwole goes around showing off its abnormally swollen muscles. It is one kind of Ultra Beast.

desc.es: Para los seres de este mundo resulta extraño y peligroso, pero en el mundo del que procede es una criatura muy común.
desc.en: Although it’s alien to this world and a danger here, it’s apparently a common organism in the world where it normally lives.

desc.es: Uno de los llamados Ultraentes. Algunos ejemplares plantan sus extremidades en el suelo como si fueran árboles y permanecen inmóviles.
desc.en: They’ve been dubbed Ultra Beasts. Some of them stand unmoving, like trees, with their arms and legs stuck into the ground.

desc.es: Para los seres de este mundo resulta extraño y peligroso, pero en el mundo del que procede es una criatura muy común.
desc.en: Although it’s alien to this world and a danger here, it’s apparently a common organism in the world where it normally lives.

desc.es: Para los seres de este mundo resulta extraño y peligroso, pero en el mundo del que procede es una criatura muy común.
desc.en: Although it’s alien to this world and a danger here, it’s apparently a common organism in the world where it normally lives.

desc.es: Uno de los extraños Ultraentes. Siempre está comiendo algo, como poseído de un hambre insaciable.
desc.en: An unknown life-form called a UB. It may be constantly hungry—it is certainly always devouring something.

desc.es: Con sus rayos láser destruye todo a su paso en busca de luz para sustentarse.
desc.en: It needs light to survive, and it goes on a rampage seeking it out. Its laser beams will cut anything to pieces.

desc.es: Con sus rayos láser destruye todo a su paso en busca de luz para sustentarse.
desc.en: It needs light to survive, and it goes on a rampage seeking it out. Its laser beams will cut anything to pieces.

desc.es: Con sus rayos láser destruye todo a su paso en busca de luz para sustentarse.
desc.en: It needs light to survive, and it goes on a rampage seeking it out. Its laser beams will cut anything to pieces.

desc.es: Con sus rayos láser destruye todo a su paso en busca de luz para sustentarse.
desc.en: It needs light to survive, and it goes on a rampage seeking it out. Its laser beams will cut anything to pieces.

desc.es: Pokémon artificial creado por científicos hace unos 500 años. Su verdadera esencia es una pieza llamada Coránima.
desc.en: Built roughly 500 years ago by a scientist, the part called the Soul-Heart is the actual life-form.

desc.es: Pokémon artificial creado por científicos hace unos 500 años. Su verdadera esencia es una pieza llamada Coránima.
desc.en: Built roughly 500 years ago by a scientist, the part called the Soul-Heart is the actual life-form.

desc.es: Pokémon artificial creado por científicos hace unos 500 años. Su verdadera esencia es una pieza llamada Coránima.
desc.en: Built roughly 500 years ago by a scientist, the part called the Soul-Heart is the actual life-form.

desc.es: Pokémon artificial creado por científicos hace unos 500 años. Su verdadera esencia es una pieza llamada Coránima.
desc.en: Built roughly 500 years ago by a scientist, the part called the Soul-Heart is the actual life-form.

desc.es: Posee la extraordinaria capacidad de infiltrarse en cualquier sombra, por lo que nadie lo había visto en mucho tiempo.
desc.en: This Pokémon can conceal itself in any shadow, so it went undiscovered for a long time.

desc.es: Un Ultraente originario de otro mundo. Se burla del oponente mientras lo rocía de veneno con el aguijón que tiene en la cabeza.
desc.en: An Ultra Beast that lives in a different world, it cackles wildly as it sprays its opponents with poison from the needles on its head.

desc.es: Uno de los Ultraentes. Su aguijón segrega un líquido tóxico cuya viscosidad le da una apariencia brillante.
desc.en: One kind of Ultra Beast, it fires a glowing, venomous liquid from its needles. This liquid is also immensely adhesive.

desc.es: Extraña criatura que podría ser un Ultraente. Parece un muro rocoso hasta que se mueve de repente y ataca.
desc.en: When stone walls started moving and attacking, the brute’s true identity was this mysterious life-form, which brings to mind an Ultra Beast.

desc.es: Un Ultraente surgido de un Ultraumbral. Crea una explosión para sorprender al oponente y aprovecha para absorber su energía vital.
desc.en: A UB that appeared from an Ultra Wormhole, it causes explosions, then takes advantage of opponents’ surprise to rob them of their vitality.

desc.es: Las almohadillas de sus patas desprenden descargas eléctricas. Cuando corre, hace que caigan rayos y reverberen los truenos.
desc.en: Electricity sparks from the pads on its limbs. Wherever Zeraora runs, lightning flashes and thunder echoes.

desc.es: Las almohadillas de sus patas desprenden descargas eléctricas. Cuando corre, hace que caigan rayos y reverberen los truenos.
desc.en: Electricity sparks from the pads on its limbs. Wherever Zeraora runs, lightning flashes and thunder echoes.

desc.es: Viven en grupos, pero, llegado el momento, el ejemplar más fuerte absorbe a sus camaradas y evoluciona.
desc.en: They live as a group, but when the time comes, one strong Meltan will absorb all the others and evolve.

desc.es: Gracias a la inercia y la fuerza centrífuga, los puñetazos que propina con sus pesadas tuercas son los más potentes del mundo Pokémon.
desc.en: Centrifugal force is behind the punches of Melmetal’s heavy hex-nut arms. Melmetal is said to deliver the strongest punches of all Pokémon.

desc.es: Gracias a la inercia y la fuerza centrífuga, los puñetazos que propina con sus pesadas tuercas son los más potentes del mundo Pokémon.
desc.en: Centrifugal force is behind the punches of Melmetal’s heavy hex-nut arms. Melmetal is said to deliver the strongest punches of all Pokémon.

desc.es: Ataca golpeando sin cesar con su baqueta, con un entusiasmo que crece a medida que acelera el ritmo.
desc.en: It attacks with rapid beats of its stick. As it strikes with amazing speed, it gets more and more pumped.

desc.es: Se concentra tanto en marcar el ritmo que, cuando su rival se debilita en combate, no se da ni cuenta.
desc.en: When it’s drumming out rapid beats in battle, it gets so caught up in the rhythm that it won’t even notice that it’s already knocked out its opponent.

desc.es: El percusionista con la técnica más depurada se convierte en líder. Son de carácter tranquilo y dan mucha importancia a la armonía del grupo.
desc.en: The one with the best drumming techniques becomes the boss of the troop. It has a gentle disposition and values harmony among its group.

desc.es: El percusionista con la técnica más depurada se convierte en líder. Son de carácter tranquilo y dan mucha importancia a la armonía del grupo.
desc.en: The one with the best drumming techniques becomes the boss of the troop. It has a gentle disposition and values harmony among its group.

desc.es: Cuando se prepara para combatir, irradia calor por la punta de la nariz y el pelo que le recubre las patas.
desc.en: It has special pads on the backs of its feet, and one on its nose. Once it’s raring to fight, these pads radiate tremendous heat.

desc.es: Para mejorar su habilidad con los pies, toma bayas de las ramas de los árboles sin usar las manos y juega a darles toques.
desc.en: It kicks berries right off the branches of trees and then juggles them with its feet, practicing its footwork.

desc.es: Destaca tanto en ataque como en defensa. Se crece cuando recibe una ovación, pero a veces se luce tanto que termina viéndose en apuros.
desc.en: It’s skilled at both offense and defense, and it gets pumped up when cheered on. But if it starts showboating, it could put itself in a tough spot.

desc.es: Destaca tanto en ataque como en defensa. Se crece cuando recibe una ovación, pero a veces se luce tanto que termina viéndose en apuros.
desc.en: It’s skilled at both offense and defense, and it gets pumped up when cheered on. But if it starts showboating, it could put itself in a tough spot.

desc.es: Al mojarse, su piel cambia de color y pasa a ser invisible, como si se hubiese camuflado.
desc.en: When it gets wet, its skin changes color, and this Pokémon becomes invisible as if it were camouflaged.

desc.es: Es inteligente, pero no muestra especial interés por nada. Distribuye trampas por su territorio para mantener alejados a sus enemigos.
desc.en: Highly intelligent but also very lazy, it keeps enemies out of its territory by laying traps everywhere.

desc.es: Dispara chorros de agua por la punta de los dedos a 3 mach de velocidad. Con su membrana nictitante puede ver los puntos débiles del rival.
desc.en: Its nictitating membranes let it pick out foes’ weak points so it can precisely blast them with water that shoots from its fingertips at Mach 3.

desc.es: Dispara chorros de agua por la punta de los dedos a 3 mach de velocidad. Con su membrana nictitante puede ver los puntos débiles del rival.
desc.en: Its nictitating membranes let it pick out foes’ weak points so it can precisely blast them with water that shoots from its fingertips at Mach 3.

desc.es: Siempre están comiendo bayas, por lo que son más robustos de lo que aparentan. Frecuentan los huertos en busca de su preciado manjar.
desc.en: It eats berries nonstop—a habit that has made it more resilient than it looks. It’ll show up on farms, searching for yet more berries.

desc.es: Sus incisivos, de fuerza y dureza extraordinarias, le permiten mordisquear incluso las bayas más duras. Es un Pokémon muy común en Galar.
desc.en: Common throughout the Galar region, this Pokémon has strong teeth and can chew through the toughest of berry shells.

desc.es: Su pequeño cuerpo le permite volar a gran velocidad para golpear los puntos débiles de rivales mucho más grandes que él.
desc.en: Jumping nimbly about, this small-bodied Pokémon takes advantage of even the slightest opportunity to disorient larger opponents.

desc.es: Tras haber librado combates muy duros, ha desarrollado la habilidad de determinar con precisión la fuerza de su adversario.
desc.en: The lessons of many harsh battles have taught it how to accurately judge an opponent’s strength.

desc.es: Debido a su excelente capacidad de vuelo y a su gran inteligencia, ejerce de taxi volador en Galar.
desc.en: With their great intellect and flying skills, these Pokémon very successfully act as the Galar region’s airborne taxi service.

desc.es: Debido a su excelente capacidad de vuelo y a su gran inteligencia, ejerce de taxi volador en Galar.
desc.en: With their great intellect and flying skills, these Pokémon very successfully act as the Galar region’s airborne taxi service.

desc.es: Es habitual verlo en el campo. Los pelos que tiene son sensores con los que percibe lo que ocurre a su alrededor.
desc.en: Often found in gardens, this Pokémon has hairs on its body that it uses to assess its surroundings.

desc.es: Está en constante crecimiento dentro del caparazón. Mientras se prepara para evolucionar, examina el exterior con sus poderes psíquicos.
desc.en: As it grows inside its shell, it uses its psychic abilities to monitor the outside world and prepare for evolution.

desc.es: Se sirve de sus poderes psíquicos, con los que es capaz de percibir lo que ocurre en un radio de 10 km, para examinar sus alrededores.
desc.en: It emits psychic energy to observe and study what’s around it—and what’s around it can include things over six miles away.

desc.es: Se sirve de sus poderes psíquicos, con los que es capaz de percibir lo que ocurre en un radio de 10 km, para examinar sus alrededores.
desc.en: It emits psychic energy to observe and study what’s around it—and what’s around it can include things over six miles away.

desc.es: Prudente y astuto, borra con la cola las huellas que deja al huir tras robarle el alimento a otro Pokémon.
desc.en: Cunning and cautious, this Pokémon survives by stealing food from others. It erases its tracks with swipes of its tail as it makes off with its plunder.

desc.es: Un Pokémon ágil y de afiladas garras que se alimenta de huevos y comida robados. Los Boltund son su enemigo natural.
desc.en: With a lithe body and sharp claws, it goes around stealing food and eggs. Boltund is its natural enemy.

desc.es: Muchos los crían tras quedar prendados de lo adorables que resultan cuando cantan dando vueltas empujados por la brisa.
desc.en: It whirls around in the wind while singing a joyous song. This delightful display has charmed many into raising this Pokémon.

desc.es: El hilo fabricado a partir de su algodón es muy bello y brillante; uno de los productos estrella de la región de Galar.
desc.en: The cotton on the head of this Pokémon can be spun into a glossy, gorgeous yarn—a Galar regional specialty.

desc.es: Si le crece el pelo demasiado, no puede moverse. Las telas confeccionadas con lana de Wooloo son sorprendentemente resistentes.
desc.en: If its fleece grows too long, Wooloo won’t be able to move. Cloth made with the wool of this Pokémon is surprisingly strong.

desc.es: Sus espléndidos cuernos sirven de reclamo para atraer al sexo opuesto. No los utiliza como arma.
desc.en: Its majestic horns are meant only to impress the opposite gender. They never see use in battle.

desc.es: El cuerno que tiene en la cabeza es duro como una roca. Lo usa para atacar al rival y, cuando este baja la guardia, lo muerde y no lo suelta.
desc.en: It starts off battles by attacking with its rock-hard horn, but as soon as the opponent flinches, this Pokémon bites down and never lets go.

desc.es: Su cuello extensible le permite alcanzar a los rivales a distancia. Hundiendo sus afilados dientes, les da el golpe de gracia.
desc.en: This Pokémon rapidly extends its retractable neck to sink its sharp fangs into distant enemies and take them down.

desc.es: Su cuello extensible le permite alcanzar a los rivales a distancia. Hundiendo sus afilados dientes, les da el golpe de gracia.
desc.en: This Pokémon rapidly extends its retractable neck to sink its sharp fangs into distant enemies and take them down.

desc.es: Son muy glotones, por lo que ayudan a la gente a cambio de comida. Echan chispas al correr.
desc.en: This gluttonous Pokémon only assists people with their work because it wants treats. As it runs, it crackles with electricity.

desc.es: La electricidad le confiere una enorme fuerza en las patas. Su velocidad punta puede superar los 90 km/h sin problema.
desc.en: It sends electricity through its legs to boost their strength. Running at top speed, it easily breaks 50 mph.

desc.es: Recorre incluso los caminos más impracticables y pedregosos como si de un monociclo se tratase. La combustión de carbón es su fuente vital.
desc.en: It can race around like a unicycle, even on rough, rocky terrain. Burning coal sustains it.

desc.es: Gira las patas a gran velocidad para correr a unos 30 km/h. Emite llamas a una temperatura de 1000 °C.
desc.en: By rapidly rolling its legs, it can travel at over 18 mph. The temperature of the flames it breathes exceeds 1,800 degrees Fahrenheit.

desc.es: Cuando se enzarza en un combate, la montaña de carbón arde al rojo vivo y esparce chispas que calcinan todo lo que le rodea.
desc.en: While it’s engaged in battle, its mountain of coal will burn bright red, sending off sparks that scorch the surrounding area.

desc.es: Cuando se enzarza en un combate, la montaña de carbón arde al rojo vivo y esparce chispas que calcinan todo lo que le rodea.
desc.en: While it’s engaged in battle, its mountain of coal will burn bright red, sending off sparks that scorch the surrounding area.

desc.es: Nada más nacer se refugia en una manzana, cuyo interior va devorando a medida que crece. El sabor de la fruta determina la evolución.
desc.en: As soon as it’s born, it burrows into an apple. Not only does the apple serve as its food source, but the flavor of the fruit determines its evolution.

desc.es: Escupe una saliva sumamente ácida y vuela con sus alas compuestas por piel de manzana, cuyo aspecto es capaz de adoptar.
desc.en: It flies on wings of apple skin and spits a powerful acid. It can also change its shape into that of an apple.

desc.es: Escupe una saliva sumamente ácida y vuela con sus alas compuestas por piel de manzana, cuyo aspecto es capaz de adoptar.
desc.en: It flies on wings of apple skin and spits a powerful acid. It can also change its shape into that of an apple.

desc.es: Su cuerpo está recubierto de néctar. La piel de la espalda es tan dulce que los niños de antaño solían tomarla como merienda.
desc.en: Its body is covered in sweet nectar, and the skin on its back is especially yummy. Children used to have it as a snack.

desc.es: Su cuerpo está recubierto de néctar. La piel de la espalda es tan dulce que los niños de antaño solían tomarla como merienda.
desc.en: Its body is covered in sweet nectar, and the skin on its back is especially yummy. Children used to have it as a snack.

desc.es: Expulsa arena por los orificios nasales. Una vez que aturde al enemigo, aprovecha la ocasión para ocultarse bajo tierra.
desc.en: It spews sand from its nostrils. While the enemy is blinded, it burrows into the ground to hide.

desc.es: La manera tan particular que tiene de enrollarse sobre sí mismo le permite expulsar con mayor eficacia la arena que almacena en la bolsa.
desc.en: Its unique style of coiling allows it to blast sand out of its sand sac more efficiently.

desc.es: La manera tan particular que tiene de enrollarse sobre sí mismo le permite expulsar con mayor eficacia la arena que almacena en la bolsa.
desc.en: Its unique style of coiling allows it to blast sand out of its sand sac more efficiently.

desc.es: Traga Arrokuda enteros debido a su glotonería, tan notable que en ocasiones ingiere hasta otros Pokémon sin querer.
desc.en: This hungry Pokémon swallows Arrokuda whole. Occasionally, it makes a mistake and tries to swallow a Pokémon other than its preferred prey.

desc.es: Traga Arrokuda enteros debido a su glotonería, tan notable que en ocasiones ingiere hasta otros Pokémon sin querer.
desc.en: This hungry Pokémon swallows Arrokuda whole. Occasionally, it makes a mistake and tries to swallow a Pokémon other than its preferred prey.

desc.es: Traga Arrokuda enteros debido a su glotonería, tan notable que en ocasiones ingiere hasta otros Pokémon sin querer.
desc.en: This hungry Pokémon swallows Arrokuda whole. Occasionally, it makes a mistake and tries to swallow a Pokémon other than its preferred prey.

desc.es: Cuando tiene el estómago lleno, le cuesta moverse y corre el riesgo de ser engullido por algún Cramorant.
desc.en: After it’s eaten its fill, its movements become extremely sluggish. That’s when Cramorant swallows it up.

desc.es: Hace girar su aleta caudal para impulsarse y arremeter contra la presa, a la que ensarta a una velocidad que supera los 100 nudos.
desc.en: It spins its tail fins to propel itself, surging forward at speeds of over 100 knots before ramming prey and spearing into them.

desc.es: Provoca una reacción química para generar energía eléctrica con sus toxinas. Aunque de bajo voltaje, puede causar entumecimiento.
desc.en: It manipulates the chemical makeup of its poison to produce electricity. The voltage is weak, but it can cause a tingling paralysis.

desc.es: Posee un carácter belicoso e irascible. Bebe una gran cantidad de agua estancada para absorber sus toxinas.
desc.en: This short-tempered and aggressive Pokémon chugs stagnant water to absorb any toxins it might contain.

desc.es: Posee un carácter belicoso e irascible. Bebe una gran cantidad de agua estancada para absorber sus toxinas.
desc.en: This short-tempered and aggressive Pokémon chugs stagnant water to absorb any toxins it might contain.

desc.es: Posee un carácter belicoso e irascible. Bebe una gran cantidad de agua estancada para absorber sus toxinas.
desc.en: This short-tempered and aggressive Pokémon chugs stagnant water to absorb any toxins it might contain.

desc.es: Posee un carácter belicoso e irascible. Bebe una gran cantidad de agua estancada para absorber sus toxinas.
desc.en: This short-tempered and aggressive Pokémon chugs stagnant water to absorb any toxins it might contain.

desc.es: Oprime a sus presas con su cuerpo candente. Una vez bien tostadas, las devora con fruición.
desc.en: It wraps prey up with its heated body, cooking them in its coils. Once they’re well-done, it will voraciously nibble them down to the last morsel.

desc.es: Posee una naturaleza agresiva. El peligro que entraña su cuerpo candente es considerable, aunque sus afilados colmillos no le van a la zaga.
desc.en: While its burning body is already dangerous on its own, this excessively hostile Pokémon also has large and very sharp fangs.

desc.es: Posee una naturaleza agresiva. El peligro que entraña su cuerpo candente es considerable, aunque sus afilados colmillos no le van a la zaga.
desc.en: While its burning body is already dangerous on its own, this excessively hostile Pokémon also has large and very sharp fangs.

desc.es: Su inteligencia es similar a la de un niño de tres años. Sus tentáculos se desprenden a menudo, pero ni se inmuta, ya que se regeneran solos.
desc.en: Its tentacles tear off easily, but it isn’t alarmed when that happens—it knows they’ll grow back. It’s about as smart as a three-year-old.

desc.es: Se aventura en tierra firme para buscar rivales contra los que luchar para medir su valía. Tras terminar el combate, regresa al mar.
desc.en: Searching for an opponent to test its skills against, it emerges onto land. Once the battle is over, it returns to the sea.

desc.es: La taza de té donde se hospeda forma parte de una antigua y valiosa vajilla, de la que circulan numerosas falsificaciones.
desc.en: The teacup in which this Pokémon makes its home is a famous piece of antique tableware. Many forgeries are in circulation.

desc.es: La taza de té donde se hospeda forma parte de una antigua y valiosa vajilla, de la que circulan numerosas falsificaciones.
desc.en: The teacup in which this Pokémon makes its home is a famous piece of antique tableware. Many forgeries are in circulation.

desc.es: Si avista una taza de té abandonada a su suerte, la rellena vertiendo parte de su propio cuerpo para generar otro Polteageist.
desc.en: Leaving leftover black tea unattended is asking for this Pokémon to come along and pour itself into it, turning the tea into a new Polteageist.

desc.es: Si avista una taza de té abandonada a su suerte, la rellena vertiendo parte de su propio cuerpo para generar otro Polteageist.
desc.en: Leaving leftover black tea unattended is asking for this Pokémon to come along and pour itself into it, turning the tea into a new Polteageist.

desc.es: Siente predilección por los lugares despoblados. Si percibe una emoción intensa, emprende la huida a toda prisa.
desc.en: If this Pokémon senses a strong emotion, it will run away as fast as it can. It prefers areas without people.

desc.es: Silencia al objetivo atizándole con los mechones. Despliega una potencia devastadora capaz de noquear a un boxeador profesional.
desc.en: Using the braids on its head, it pummels foes to get them to quiet down. One blow from those braids would knock out a professional boxer.

desc.es: Recibe el apodo de Hechicera del Bosque. Quienes arman demasiado barullo se exponen a ser despedazados por las garras de su tentáculo.
desc.en: If you’re too loud around it, you risk being torn apart by the claws on its tentacle. This Pokémon is also known as the Forest Witch.

desc.es: Recibe el apodo de Hechicera del Bosque. Quienes arman demasiado barullo se exponen a ser despedazados por las garras de su tentáculo.
desc.en: If you’re too loud around it, you risk being torn apart by the claws on its tentacle. This Pokémon is also known as the Forest Witch.

desc.es: Se infiltra en las casas para hurtar a sus anchas y, por si fuera poco, nutrirse de la energía negativa que liberan sus contrariados habitantes.
desc.en: It sneaks into people’s homes, stealing things and feasting on the negative energy of the frustrated occupants.

desc.es: De noche, atrae con astucia a su objetivo hasta el bosque. Al parecer, tiene la capacidad de hacer crecer productos agrícolas.
desc.en: With sly cunning, it tries to lure people into the woods. Some believe it to have the power to make crops grow.

desc.es: Su cabello desempeña una función similar a la de fibras musculares. Al soltárselo, su movimiento tentacular le permite reducir a su objetivo.
desc.en: Its hairs work like muscle fibers. When its hairs unfurl, they latch on to opponents, ensnaring them as tentacles would.

desc.es: Su cabello desempeña una función similar a la de fibras musculares. Al soltárselo, su movimiento tentacular le permite reducir a su objetivo.
desc.en: Its hairs work like muscle fibers. When its hairs unfurl, they latch on to opponents, ensnaring them as tentacles would.

desc.es: Evoluciona tras haber librado numerosas peleas. El grito de guerra que profiere mientras pone los brazos en cruz atemoriza a cualquier rival.
desc.en: It evolved after experiencing numerous fights. While crossing its arms, it lets out a shout that would make any opponent flinch.

desc.es: Su devoción por la lucha ha propiciado que evolucionara y le ha conferido unas peligrosas garras que se convierten en dagas al extenderse.
desc.en: After many battles, it evolved dangerous claws that come together to form daggers when extended.

desc.es: Conviene tener cuidado con el cuerpo espectral que recubre su alma, pues quien lo toque podría acabar inerte como una piedra.
desc.en: Be cautious of the ectoplasmic body surrounding its soul. You’ll become stiff as stone if you touch it.

desc.es: Repele ataques con las hojas de su duro puerro y contraataca con su tallo afilado. El puerro que le sirve de armamento sigue siendo comestible.
desc.en: After deflecting attacks with its hard leaf shield, it strikes back with its sharp leek stalk. The leek stalk is both weapon and food.

desc.es: Se ha granjeado la simpatía de todo el mundo por sus cómicos movimientos. Emite poderes psíquicos por el motivo de su barriga.
desc.en: Its amusing movements make it very popular. It releases its psychic power from the pattern on its belly.

desc.es: Su cuerpo, similar a una sombra, no debe tocarse bajo ningún concepto o se visualizarán los horribles recuerdos impregnados en la imagen.
desc.en: Never touch its shadowlike body, or you’ll be shown the horrific memories behind the picture carved into it.

desc.es: Se dice que las pastelerías donde ha aparecido Milcery tienen casi todas las papeletas para saborear las mieles del éxito.
desc.en: They say that any patisserie visited by Milcery is guaranteed success and good fortune.

desc.es: La nata que le brota de las manos es más dulce y sustanciosa cuando está feliz.
desc.en: When Alcremie is content, the cream it secretes from its hands becomes sweeter and richer.

desc.es: La nata que le brota de las manos es más dulce y sustanciosa cuando está feliz.
desc.en: When Alcremie is content, the cream it secretes from its hands becomes sweeter and richer.

desc.es: Este Pokémon está formado por seis individuos que cambian de formación al luchar, haciendo gala de un notable espíritu de equipo.
desc.en: The six of them work together as one Pokémon. Teamwork is also their battle strategy, and they constantly change their formation as they fight.

desc.es: Este Pokémon está formado por seis individuos que cambian de formación al luchar, haciendo gala de un notable espíritu de equipo.
desc.en: The six of them work together as one Pokémon. Teamwork is also their battle strategy, and they constantly change their formation as they fight.

desc.es: Acumula electricidad en cada una de sus púas. Aunque estas se rompan, son capaces de seguir descargando energía durante 3 h.
desc.en: It stores electricity in each spine. Even if one gets broken off, it still continues to emit electricity for at least three hours.

desc.es: Se nutre de la nieve acumulada en el terreno. Cuanta más ingiere, más imponentes se vuelven las púas que presenta en el lomo.
desc.en: It eats snow that piles up on the ground. The more snow it eats, the bigger and more impressive the spikes on its back grow.

desc.es: No muestra la menor compasión con quien asole el campo: lo escarmienta batiendo sus gélidas alas para provocar una ventisca.
desc.en: It shows no mercy to any who desecrate fields and mountains. It will fly around on its icy wings, causing a blizzard to chase offenders away.

desc.es: Una vez al año y en una fecha concreta, tienen la costumbre de aparecer de la nada para reunirse y formar un círculo.
desc.en: Once a year, on a specific date and at a specific time, they gather out of nowhere and form up in a circle.

desc.es: Se enfría constantemente la cara con hielo por su escasa resistencia al calor. Utiliza el pelo de la cabeza para pescar en el mar.
desc.en: This Pokémon keeps its heat-sensitive head cool with ice. It fishes for its food, dangling its single hair into the sea to lure in prey.

desc.es: Se enfría constantemente la cara con hielo por su escasa resistencia al calor. Utiliza el pelo de la cabeza para pescar en el mar.
desc.en: This Pokémon keeps its heat-sensitive head cool with ice. It fishes for its food, dangling its single hair into the sea to lure in prey.

desc.es: Con sus cuernos percibe las emociones de los seres vivos que se hallen cerca. Los sentimientos positivos constituyen su fuente de energía.
desc.en: Through its horns, it can pick up on the emotions of creatures around it. Positive emotions are the source of its strength.

desc.es: Con sus cuernos percibe las emociones de los seres vivos que se hallen cerca. Los sentimientos positivos constituyen su fuente de energía.
desc.en: Through its horns, it can pick up on the emotions of creatures around it. Positive emotions are the source of its strength.

desc.es: Siempre tiene apetito, sin importar lo mucho que coma. Lleva con sumo cuidado las semillas que ha tostado con su propia electricidad.
desc.en: It carries electrically roasted seeds with it as if they’re precious treasures. No matter how much it eats, it always gets hungry again in short order.

desc.es: Siempre tiene apetito, sin importar lo mucho que coma. Lleva con sumo cuidado las semillas que ha tostado con su propia electricidad.
desc.en: It carries electrically roasted seeds with it as if they’re precious treasures. No matter how much it eats, it always gets hungry again in short order.

desc.es: Realiza tareas que requieren de esfuerzo físico, es su fuerte. Con la lluvia, su cuerpo de cobre se oxida y adquiere una tonalidad verde intensa.
desc.en: If a job requires serious strength, this Pokémon will excel at it. Its copper body tarnishes in the rain, turning a vibrant green color.

desc.es: Viven en manadas. La fuerza prensil de su trompa es tan extraordinaria que le permite hacer añicos incluso grandes rocas.
desc.en: These Pokémon live in herds. Their trunks have incredible grip strength, strong enough to crush giant rocks into powder.

desc.es: Viven en manadas. La fuerza prensil de su trompa es tan extraordinaria que le permite hacer añicos incluso grandes rocas.
desc.en: These Pokémon live in herds. Their trunks have incredible grip strength, strong enough to crush giant rocks into powder.

desc.es: Produce electricidad con la robusta musculatura de la cola. El tamaño de la parte superior del cuerpo palidece en comparación con la inferior.
desc.en: The powerful muscles in its tail generate its electricity. Compared to its lower body, its upper half is entirely too small.

desc.es: Antiguamente vivía en el mar y usaba el hielo del cuerpo para conservar los alimentos. Su extrema lentitud, sin embargo, lo condenó a la extinción.
desc.en: This Pokémon lived on prehistoric seashores and was able to preserve food with the ice on its body. It went extinct because it moved so slowly.

desc.es: Exhibe con orgullo su inmensa capacidad motriz, que le permite superar los 60 km/h, pero solo puede respirar bajo el agua.
desc.en: Its mighty legs are capable of running at speeds exceeding 40 mph, but this Pokémon can’t breathe unless it’s underwater.

desc.es: Aunque la piel de su rostro era capaz de resistir cualquier ataque, su dificultad para respirar acabó provocando su extinción.
desc.en: The skin on its face is impervious to attack, but breathing difficulties made this Pokémon go extinct anyway.

desc.es: Hace gala de una agilidad extraordinaria, ya que su cuerpo está compuesto de un metal especial. Detesta la lluvia, por lo que habita en cuevas.
desc.en: The special metal that composes its body is very light, so this Pokémon has considerable agility. It lives in caves because it dislikes the rain.

desc.es: Hace gala de una agilidad extraordinaria, ya que su cuerpo está compuesto de un metal especial. Detesta la lluvia, por lo que habita en cuevas.
desc.en: The special metal that composes its body is very light, so this Pokémon has considerable agility. It lives in caves because it dislikes the rain.

desc.es: En solitario es tan débil que no sería rival ni para un niño, pero, al entrenarse con sus congéneres, evoluciona y se vuelve más fuerte.
desc.en: If this weak Pokémon is by itself, a mere child could defeat it. But if Dreepy has friends to help it train, it can evolve and become much stronger.

desc.es: Si no lleva un Dreepy del que cuidar encima de la cabeza, se intranquiliza y trata de sustituirlo con otro Pokémon.
desc.en: Without a Dreepy to place on its head and care for, it gets so uneasy it’ll try to substitute any Pokémon it finds for the missing Dreepy.

desc.es: Al parecer, los Dreepy que residen en sus cuernos esperan con ilusión el momento de ser propulsados a velocidad supersónica.
desc.en: Apparently the Dreepy inside Dragapult’s horns eagerly look forward to being launched out at Mach speeds.

desc.es: Hay quien lo considera una suerte de figura fraterna a la par que rival de Zamazenta, un Pokémon sumido en un profundo letargo.
desc.en: This Pokémon has slumbered for many years. Some say it’s Zamazenta’s elder sister—others say the two Pokémon are rivals.

desc.es: Hay quien lo considera una suerte de figura fraterna a la par que rival de Zamazenta, un Pokémon sumido en un profundo letargo.
desc.en: This Pokémon has slumbered for many years. Some say it’s Zamazenta’s elder sister—others say the two Pokémon are rivals.

desc.es: Con la apariencia de una estatua de piedra, este Pokémon se sumió en un letargo tan profundo que acabó cayendo en el olvido.
desc.en: This Pokémon slept for aeons while in the form of a statue. It was asleep for so long, people forgot that it ever existed.

desc.es: Con la apariencia de una estatua de piedra, este Pokémon se sumió en un letargo tan profundo que acabó cayendo en el olvido.
desc.en: This Pokémon slept for aeons while in the form of a statue. It was asleep for so long, people forgot that it ever existed.

desc.es: Fue hallado en el interior de un meteorito caído hace 20 000 años. Por lo visto, está relacionado con el misterio que rodea al fenómeno Dinamax.
desc.en: It was inside a meteorite that fell 20,000 years ago. There seems to be a connection between this Pokémon and the Dynamax phenomenon.

desc.es: Fue hallado en el interior de un meteorito caído hace 20 000 años. Por lo visto, está relacionado con el misterio que rodea al fenómeno Dinamax.
desc.en: It was inside a meteorite that fell 20,000 years ago. There seems to be a connection between this Pokémon and the Dynamax phenomenon.

desc.es: Al tirar de los mechones blancos de la cabeza, acrecienta su espíritu luchador y empieza a acumular fuerza en el órgano de su bajo vientre.
desc.en: If Kubfu pulls the long white hair on its head, its fighting spirit heightens and power wells up from the depths of its belly.

desc.es: Vive en zonas montañosas en áreas recónditas, donde entrena corriendo por escarpados riscos para fortalecer sus piernas y refinar su técnica.
desc.en: Inhabiting the mountains of a distant region, this Pokémon races across sheer cliffs, training its legs and refining its moves.

desc.es: Vive en zonas montañosas en áreas recónditas, donde entrena corriendo por escarpados riscos para fortalecer sus piernas y refinar su técnica.
desc.en: Inhabiting the mountains of a distant region, this Pokémon races across sheer cliffs, training its legs and refining its moves.

desc.es: Vive en zonas montañosas en áreas recónditas, donde entrena corriendo por escarpados riscos para fortalecer sus piernas y refinar su técnica.
desc.en: Inhabiting the mountains of a distant region, this Pokémon races across sheer cliffs, training its legs and refining its moves.

desc.es: Vive en zonas montañosas en áreas recónditas, donde entrena corriendo por escarpados riscos para fortalecer sus piernas y refinar su técnica.
desc.en: Inhabiting the mountains of a distant region, this Pokémon races across sheer cliffs, training its legs and refining its moves.

desc.es: Las lianas que le brotan del cuerpo nutren y fertilizan el mantillo del bosque cuando se le desprenden.
desc.en: Once the vines on Zarude’s body tear off, they become nutrients in the soil. This helps the plants of the forest grow.

desc.es: Las lianas que le brotan del cuerpo nutren y fertilizan el mantillo del bosque cuando se le desprenden.
desc.en: Once the vines on Zarude’s body tear off, they become nutrients in the soil. This helps the plants of the forest grow.

desc.es: Todo su cuerpo es un órgano electrógeno, cuya potencia sería suficiente para abastecer la región de Galar por completo.
desc.en: Its entire body is made up of a single organ that generates electrical energy. Regieleki is capable of creating all Galar’s electricity.

desc.es: Todo su cuerpo es una gema de energía dragón cristalizada. Se cree que posee los poderes de todos los Pokémon dragón.
desc.en: Its body is composed of crystallized dragon energy. Regidrago is said to have the powers of every dragon Pokémon.

desc.es: Cuenta con una fuerza física sobrecogedora. La máscara de hielo que le cubre el rostro es cien veces más dura que el diamante.
desc.en: Glastrier has tremendous physical strength, and the mask of ice covering its face is 100 times harder than diamond.

desc.es: Amante de la quietud y la soledad, galopa por las tinieblas nocturnas absorbiendo la energía vital de toda criatura que esté durmiendo.
desc.en: As it dashes through the night, Spectrier absorbs the life-force of sleeping creatures. It craves silence and solitude.

desc.es: Legendario monarca del antiguo Galar. Posee el poder de sanar el espíritu y de hacer brotar la vegetación.
desc.en: Calyrex is known in legend as a king that ruled over Galar in ancient times. It has the power to cause hearts to mend and plants to spring forth.

desc.es: Legendario monarca del antiguo Galar. Posee el poder de sanar el espíritu y de hacer brotar la vegetación.
desc.en: Calyrex is known in legend as a king that ruled over Galar in ancient times. It has the power to cause hearts to mend and plants to spring forth.

desc.es: Legendario monarca del antiguo Galar. Posee el poder de sanar el espíritu y de hacer brotar la vegetación.
desc.en: Calyrex is known in legend as a king that ruled over Galar in ancient times. It has the power to cause hearts to mend and plants to spring forth.

desc.es: Utilizando las esferas negras en la base de sus astas, este Pokémon genera y libera energía psíquica lo suficientemente poderosa como para distorsionar el espacio.
desc.en: The black orbs shine with an uncanny light when the Pokémon is erecting invisible barriers. The fur shed from its beard retains heat well and is a highly useful material for winter clothing.

desc.es: Una criatura violenta que derriba árboles imponentes con sus toscas hachas y se protege con dura piedra. Si uno se topa con este Pokémon en estado salvaje, lo único que puede hacer es huir.
desc.en: A violent creature that fells towering trees with its crude axes and shields itself with hard stone. If one should chance upon this Pokémon in the wilds, one's only recourse is to flee.

desc.es: Creo que fue el terreno pantanoso de Hisui lo que le dio a Ursaluna su físico robusto y su nueva capacidad para manipular la turba a voluntad.
desc.en: I believe it was Hisui's swampy terrain that gave Ursaluna its burly physique and newfound capacity to manipulate peat at will.

desc.es: Creo que fue el terreno pantanoso de Hisui lo que le dio a Ursaluna su físico robusto y su nueva capacidad para manipular la turba a voluntad.
desc.en: I believe it was Hisui's swampy terrain that gave Ursaluna its burly physique and newfound capacity to manipulate peat at will.

desc.es: Se reviste de las almas de los camaradas que perecieron antes de cumplir su objetivo de remontar el río. Ninguna otra especie en todos los ríos de Hisui es igual a Basculegion.
desc.en: Clads itself in the souls of comrades that perished before fulfilling their goals of journeying upstream. No other species throughout all Hisui's rivers is Basculegion's equal.

desc.es: Debido al veneno virulento y la formidable fuerza física del Sneasler, ninguna otra especie podría vencerlo en las gélidas tierras altas. Esta especie prefiere la soledad y no forma manadas.
desc.en: Clads itself in the souls of comrades that perished before fulfilling their goals of journeying upstream. No other species throughout all Hisui's rivers is Basculegion's equal.

desc.es: Debido al veneno virulento y la formidable fuerza física del Sneasler, ninguna otra especie podría vencerlo en las gélidas tierras altas. Esta especie prefiere la soledad y no forma manadas.
desc.en: Because of Sneasler's virulent poison and daunting physical prowess, no other species could hope to best it on the frozen highlands. Preferring solitude, this species does not form packs.

desc.es: Debido al veneno virulento y la formidable fuerza física del Sneasler, ninguna otra especie podría vencerlo en las gélidas tierras altas. Esta especie prefiere la soledad y no forma manadas.
desc.en: Its lancelike spikes and savage temperament have earned it the nickname ”sea fiend.” It slurps up poison to nourish itself.

desc.es: Cuando vuela a esta tierra desde el otro lado del mar, el crudo invierno llega a su fin. Según la leyenda, el amor de este Pokémon da origen al florecimiento de nueva vida en Hisui.
desc.en: When it flies to this land from across the sea, the bitter winter comes to an end. According to legend, this Pokémon's love gives rise to the budding of fresh life across Hisui.

desc.es: Con una apariencia distinta a su forma humanoide femenina, desciende de las nubes sobre aquellos que tratan con falta de respeto a cualquier forma de vida, infligiendo un castigo implacable y vengativo.
desc.en: When it flies to this land from across the sea, the bitter winter comes to an end. According to legend, this Pokémon's love gives rise to the budding of fresh life across Hisui.

desc.es: El dulce aroma que desprende su cuerpo hipnotiza a quienes lo rodean. Este aroma se intensifica cuando este Pokémon está expuesto al sol.
desc.en: The sweet scent its body gives off mesmerizes those around it. The scent grows stronger when this Pokémon is in the sun.

desc.es: La dureza del pelaje de Floragato depende del estado de ánimo del Pokémon. Cuando Floragato se prepara para la batalla, su pelaje se vuelve puntiagudo y afilado como agujas.
desc.en: The hardness of Floragato’s fur depends on the Pokémon’s mood. When Floragato is prepared to battle, its fur becomes pointed and needle sharp.

desc.es: Después de desviar hábilmente la atención del oponente, le lanza sus bombas florales rellenas de polen y las hace estallar sin que se dé cuenta.
desc.en: With skillful misdirection, it rigs foes with pollen-packed flower bombs. Meowscarada sets off the bombs before its foes realize what’s going on.

desc.es: Como su saca de fuego es pequeña, la energía ígnea que rebosa se libera por la muesca de su cabeza en forma de una trémula llama.
desc.en: Its flame sac is small, so energy is always leaking out. This energy is released from the dent atop Fuecoco’s head and flickers to and fro.

desc.es: Sus cuerdas vocales y la válvula de su saca de fuego están estrechamente relacionadas. Emite sonidos guturales al expeler llamas.
desc.en: The valve in Crocalor’s flame sac is closely connected to its vocal cords. This Pokémon utters a guttural cry as it spews flames every which way.

desc.es: Su dulce canto calma el espíritu de quien lo oye. Achicharra a sus enemigos con llamas que llegan a alcanzar los 3000ºC.
desc.en: Skeledirge’s gentle singing soothes the souls of all that hear it. It burns its enemies to a crisp with flames of over 5,400 degrees Fahrenheit.

desc.es: La fuerza de sus patas le permite nadar incluso por las más fuertes corrientes fluviales. Adora la pulcritud y peca de inflexible en su actitud.
desc.en: Its strong legs let it easily swim around in even fast-flowing rivers. It likes to keep things tidy and is prone to overthinking things.

desc.es: Un Pokémon diligente que ha creado su propio estilo de danza tras observar los movimientos de humanos y Pokémon de varias regiones.
desc.en: The hardworking Quaxwell observes people and Pokémon from various regions and incorporates their movements into its own dance routines.

desc.es: Embelesa a quien lo ve con una danza que rebosa de exotismo y corta a sus rivales con sus plumas ornamentales hechas de agua.
desc.en: Dancing in ways that evoke far-away places, this Pokémon mesmerizes all that see it. Flourishes of its decorative water feathers slice into its foes.

desc.es: Se alimenta únicamente de los más selectos manjares. Su cuerpo despide un olor herbáceo que los Pokémon de tipo Bicho detestan.
desc.en: This Pokémon spurns all but the finest of foods. Its body gives off an herblike scent that bug Pokémon detest.

desc.es: Emana una fragancia dulce y almizclada por todo el cuerpo que desarma por completo a los Pokémon hembra
desc.en: It entrances female Pokémon with the sweet, alluring scent that wafts from all over its body.

desc.es: Un Pokémon meticuloso que adora la pulcritud. Se envuelve de una fragancia floral que calma a los Pokémon de su alrededor
desc.en: It entrances female Pokémon with the sweet, alluring scent that wafts from all over its body.

desc.es: El hilo que secreta por la parte trasera es fuerte como el alambre. Su resistencia es un misterio que a día de hoy aún se sigue estudiando.
desc.en: The thread it secretes from its rear is as strong as wire. The secret behind the thread’s strength is the topic of ongoing research.

desc.es: Protege su territorio cubriéndolo con una tela de hilo resistente y pegajoso que actúa como una trampa frente a los intrusos.
desc.en: Spidops covers its territory in tough, sticky threads to set up traps for intruders.
It’s highly skilled at a fighting style in which it uses its jumping capabilities to dodge incoming attacks while also dealing damage to opponents.
It uses its normally folded third set of legs when in Showdown Mode. This places a huge burden on its body, so it can’t stay in this mode for long.
The pads of its paws are electricity-discharging organs. Pawmi fires electricity from its forepaws while standing unsteadily on its hind legs.
Pawmo uses a unique fighting technique in which it uses its forepaws to strike foes and zap them with electricity from its paw pads simultaneously.
Pawmot’s fluffy fur acts as a battery. It can store the same amount of electricity as an electric car.
The pair sticks together no matter what. They split any food they find exactly in half and then eat it together.
The larger pair protects the little ones during battles. When facing strong opponents, the whole group will join the fight.
The larger pair protects the little ones during battles. When facing strong opponents, the whole group will join the fight.
The yeast in Fidough’s breath is useful for cooking, so this Pokémon has been protected by people since long ago.
The surface of this Pokémon’s skin hardens when exposed to intense heat, and its body has an appetizing aroma.
This Pokémon converts nutrients into oil, which it stores in the fruit on its head. It can easily go a whole week without eating or drinking.
It basks in the sun to its heart’s content until the fruits on its head ripen. After that, Dolliv departs from human settlements and goes on a journey.
This Pokémon drives back enemies by launching its rich, aromatic oil at them with enough force to smash a boulder.
Green-feathered flocks hold the most sway. When they’re out searching for food in the mornings and evenings, it gets very noisy.
Green-feathered flocks hold the most sway. When they’re out searching for food in the mornings and evenings, it gets very noisy.
Green-feathered flocks hold the most sway. When they’re out searching for food in the mornings and evenings, it gets very noisy.

The ground scrapes its body as it travels, causing it to leave salt behind. Salt is constantly being created and replenished inside Nacli’s body.
It compresses rock salt inside its body and shoots out hardened salt pellets with enough force to perforate an iron sheet.
Many Pokémon gather around Garganacl, hoping to lick at its mineral-rich salt.
Its firepower increases when it fights, reaching over 1,800 degrees Fahrenheit. It likes berries that are rich in fat.
This Pokémon clads itself in armor that has been fortified by psychic and fire energy, and it shoots blazing fireballs.
An old set of armor steeped in grudges caused this Pokémon’s evolution. Ceruledge cuts its enemies to pieces without mercy.
It floats using the electricity stored in its body. When thunderclouds are around, Tadbulb will float higher off the ground.
What appear to be eyeballs are actually organs for discharging the electricity generated by Bellibolt’s belly-button dynamo.
These Pokémon make their nests on coastal cliffs. The nests have a strange, crackling texture, and they’re a popular delicacy.
It uses its throat sac to store electricity generated by its wings. There’s hardly any oil in its feathers, so it is a poor swimmer.
Its well-developed jaw and fangs are strong enough to crunch through boulders, and its thick fat makes for an excellent defense.
Mabosstiff loves playing with children. Though usually gentle, it takes on an intimidating look when protecting its family.
To keep enemies away from its territory, it paints markings around its nest using a poisonous liquid that has an acrid odor.
Each Grafaiai paints its own individual pattern, and it will paint that same pattern over and over again throughout its life.
Not even Bramblin knows where it is headed as it tumbles across the wilderness, blown by the wind. It loathes getting wet.
Brambleghast wanders around arid regions. On rare occasions, mass outbreaks of these Pokémon will bury an entire town.
Though it looks like Tentacool, Toedscool is a completely different species. Its legs may be thin, but it can run at a speed of 30 mph.
It coils its 10 tentacles around prey and sucks out their nutrients, causing the prey pain. The folds along the rim of its head are a popular delicacy.
This Pokémon lives on sheer cliffs. It sidesteps opponents’ attacks, then lunges for their weak spots with its claws.
Traditional Paldean dishes can be extremely spicy because they include the shed front teeth of Capsakid among their ingredients.
The green head has turned vicious due to the spicy chemicals stimulating its brain. Once it goes on a rampage, there is no stopping it.
The green head has turned vicious due to the spicy chemicals stimulating its brain. Once it goes on a rampage, there is no stopping it.
It rolls its mud ball around while the energy it needs for evolution matures. Eventually the time comes for it to evolve.
An infant sleeps inside the ball. Rabsca rolls the ball soothingly with its legs to ensure the infant sleeps comfortably.
It spends its time running around wastelands. If anyone steals its beloved berries, it will chase them down and exact its revenge.
It emits psychic power from the gaps between its multicolored frills and sprints at speeds greater than 120 mph.
This Pokémon pounds iron scraps together to make a hammer. It will remake the hammer again and again until it’s satisfied with the result.
These Pokémon make their homes in piles of scrap metal. They test the strength of each other’s hammers by smashing them together.
The hammer tops 220 pounds, yet it gets swung around easily by Tinkaton as it steals whatever it pleases and carries its plunder back home.
Though it looks like Diglett, Wiglett is an entirely different species. The resemblance seems to be a coincidental result of environmental adaptation.
A variety of fish Pokémon, Wugtrio was once considered to be a regional form of Dugtrio.
Bombirdier uses the apron on its chest to bundle up food, which it carries back to its nest. It enjoys dropping things that make loud noises.
Its water ring is made from seawater mixed with a sticky fluid that Finizen secretes from its blowhole.
Its physical capabilities are no different than a Finizen’s, but when its allies are in danger, it transforms and powers itself up.
Its physical capabilities are no different than a Finizen’s, but when its allies are in danger, it transforms and powers itself up.
The steel section is Varoom’s actual body. This Pokémon clings to rocks and converts the minerals within into energy to fuel its activities.
Revavroom viciously threatens others with the sound of its exhaust. It sticks its tongue out from its cylindrical mouth and sprays toxic fluids.
It can sprint at over 70 mph while carrying a human. The rider’s body heat warms Cyclizar’s back and lifts the Pokémon’s spirit.
This Pokémon lives in arid deserts. It maintains its metal body by consuming iron from the soil.
Glimmet’s toxic mineral crystals look just like flower petals. This Pokémon scatters poisonous powder like pollen to protect itself.
Glimmora’s petals are made of crystallized poison energy. It has recently become evident that these petals resemble Tera Jewels.
Glimmora’s petals are made of crystallized poison energy. It has recently become evident that these petals resemble Tera Jewels.
This friendly Pokémon doesn’t like being alone. Pay it even the slightest bit of attention, and it will follow you forever.
A lovingly mourned Pokémon was reborn as Houndstone. It doesn’t like anyone touching the protuberance atop its head.
Thanks to a behavior of theirs known as “synchronizing,” an entire flock of these Pokémon can attack simultaneously in perfect harmony.
It lives in frigid regions in pods of five or so individuals. It loves the minerals found in snow and ice.
Ice energy builds up in the horn on its upper jaw, causing the horn to reach cryogenic temperatures that freeze its surroundings.
Veluza has excellent regenerative capabilities. It sheds spare flesh from its body to boost its agility, then charges at its prey.
It treats Tatsugiri like its boss and follows it loyally. Though powerful, Dondozo is apparently not very smart.
Tatsugiri is an extremely cunning Pokémon. It feigns weakness to lure in prey, then orders its partner to attack.
Tatsugiri is an extremely cunning Pokémon. It feigns weakness to lure in prey, then orders its partner to attack.

It imbues its fists with the power of the rage that it kept hidden in its heart. Opponents struck by these imbued fists will be shattered to their core.
It lives at the bottom of ponds and swamps. It will carry Wooper on its back and ferry them across water from one shore to the other.
The hardened head from the tail protects the head of the main body as Farigiraf whips its long neck around to headbutt enemies.
It drives enemies out of its nest by sucking in enough air to fill its long, narrow lungs, then releasing the air in an intense blast.
It drives enemies out of its nest by sucking in enough air to fill its long, narrow lungs, then releasing the air in an intense blast.
Though it commands a massive army in battle, it’s not skilled at devising complex strategies. It just uses brute strength to keep pushing.
This creature resembles a mysterious Pokémon that, according to a paranormal magazine, has lived since ancient times.
It resembles a mysterious Pokémon described in a paranormal magazine as a Jigglypuff from one billion years ago.
It bears a slight resemblance to a Pokémon described in a dubious magazine as a cross between a dinosaur and a mushroom.
It has similar features to a ghostly pterosaur that was covered in a paranormal magazine, but the two have little else in common.
This Pokémon somewhat resembles an ancient form of Volcarona that was introduced in a dubious magazine.
It slightly resembles a Magneton that lived for 10,000 years and was featured in an article in a paranormal magazine.
Sightings of this Pokémon have occurred in recent years. It resembles a mysterious object described in an old expedition journal.
It resembles a mysterious object mentioned in an old book. There are only two reported sightings of this Pokémon.
This Pokémon shares many similarities with Iron Hands, an object mentioned in a certain expedition journal.
It’s possible that Iron Jugulis, an object described in an old book, may actually be this Pokémon.
No records exist of this species being caught. Data is lacking, but the Pokémon’s traits match up with an object described in an old book.
Some of its notable features match those of an object named within a certain expedition journal as Iron Thorns.
This Pokémon lives in forests and craggy areas. Using the power of its dorsal fin, it cools the inside of its nest like a refrigerator.
It attacks with the blade of its frozen dorsal fin by doing a front flip in the air. Arctibax’s strong back and legs allow it to pull off this technique.
It launches itself into battle by flipping upside down and spewing frigid air from its mouth. It finishes opponents off with its dorsal blade.
It launches itself into battle by flipping upside down and spewing frigid air from its mouth. It finishes opponents off with its dorsal blade.
It lives inside an old treasure chest. Sometimes it gets left in shop corners since no one realizes it’s actually a Pokémon.
It lives inside an old treasure chest. Sometimes it gets left in shop corners since no one realizes it’s actually a Pokémon.
It has a sturdy body made up of stacked coins. Gholdengo overwhelms its enemies by firing coin after coin at them in quick succession.
It drains the life-force from vegetation, causing nearby forests to instantly wither and fields to turn barren.
The hatred of those who perished by the sword long ago has clad itself in snow and become a Pokémon.
It slowly brings its exceedingly heavy head down upon the ground, splitting the earth open with huge fissures that run over 160 feet deep.
The envy accumulated within curved beads that sparked multiple conflicts has clad itself in fire and become a Pokémon.
According to an article in a dubious magazine, this Pokémon has some connection to a phenomenon that occurs in a certain region.
It’s possible that this is the object listed as Iron Valiant in a certain expedition journal.
This Pokémon resembles Cyclizar, but it is far burlier and more ferocious. Nothing is known about its ecology or other features.
This seems to be the Iron Serpent mentioned in an old book. The Iron Serpent is said to have turned the land to ash with its lightning.
It resembles an illustration published in a paranormal magazine, said to be a depiction of a super-ancient Suicune.
According to the few eyewitness accounts that exist, it used its shining blades to julienne large trees and boulders.
The head sticking out belongs to the fore-wyrm, while the tail belongs to the core-wyrm. The two share one apple and help each other out.
Poltchageist looks like a regional form of Sinistea, but it was recently discovered that the two Pokémon are entirely unrelated.
Poltchageist looks like a regional form of Sinistea, but it was recently discovered that the two Pokémon are entirely unrelated.
It prefers cool, dark places, such as the back of a shelf or the space beneath a home's floorboards. It wanders in search of prey after sunset.

Okidogi is a ruffian with a short temper. It can pulverize anything by swinging around the chain on its neck.
Munkidori keeps itself somewhere safe while it toys with its foes, using psychokinesis to induce intense dizziness.
Fezandipiti beats its glossy wings to scatter pheromones that captivate people and Pokémon.
This mischief-loving Pokémon is full of curiosity. It battles by drawing out the type-based energy contained within its masks.

It digs holes on mountains, searching for food. It’s so durable that being caught in a cave-in won’t faze it.
These capricious syrpents have banded together. On the rare occasion that their moods align, their true power is unleashed.
It resembles an eerie Pokémon once shown in a paranormal magazine. That Pokémon was said to be an Entei regenerated from a fossil.
It bears resemblance to a Pokémon that became a hot topic for a short while after a paranormal magazine touted it as Raikou's ancestor.
It was named after a mysterious object recorded in an old book. Its body seems to be metallic.
There was supposedly an incident in which it launched shining blades to cut everything around it to pieces. Little else is known about it.
It’s thought that this Pokémon lived in ancient Paldea until it got caught in seismic shifts and went extinct.

Its peach-shaped shell serves as storage for a potent poison. It makes poisonous mochi and serves them to people and Pokémon.
